title: Google Pac-Man Retro
description: The timeless retro arcade classic. Navigate the maze, gobble up pac-dots, and evade Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde to achieve high scores.
controls: Arrow keys to steer and run away from ghosts.

title: 2048 Puzzle
description: Combine sliding numbered tiles in a grid to merge them and reach the ultimate 2048 tile in this highly addictive logic-based puzzle game.
controls: Arrow keys to slide tiles in all four directions.

title: Classic Retro Snake
description: Guide the hungry snake to eat pellets and grow longer. Be extremely careful not to run into walls or bite your own growing tail!
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to control direction.

title: Hextris Action
description: A high-speed combination of Tetris and hexagon matching. Rotate the hexagon block to stack colored bricks together in triplets or more.
controls: Left and Right Arrow keys (or A and D) to rotate. Spacebar to drop.

title: T-Rex Runner
description: The legendary offline browser game. Help the running dinosaur leap over cactus plants and dodge flying pterodactyls in this infinite runner.
controls: Spacebar or Up Arrow to jump. Down Arrow to duck under obstacles.

title: Flappy Bird Revival
description: The notorious hurdle-dodging arcade game. Tap precisely to flap your wings and clear narrow gaps in a series of green industrial pipes.
controls: Click inside the game, or press Spacebar / Touch screen to flap.

title: Cyber Minesweeper
description: A customized interactive space Minesweeper built directly into the Hub. Clear the grid without detonating hidden dark-matter mines.
controls: Left click to reveal a tile. Right click to place/remove a protective shield flag.

title: Retro Miner Clicker
description: An interactive pixel ore mining clicker. Accumulate space credits, hire AI mining droids, and upgrade pickaxes to expand your operation.
controls: Click the central glowing reactor tile to mine. Click upgrades to automate mining.
